cognition/mobility pilot, translation-review context, risk-of-bias records, and registry-only active trial-watch records. Full article/table safety extraction for DKD, IPF, AD-risk, D+Q bone supplement material, and harmonized cross-human adverse-event definitions remain incomplete.","priority":"high","suggested_action":"Run retained full-text or table-row extraction for DKD, IPF, and AD-risk safety details, reconcile any D+Q bone supplement safety tables, and create a cross-human safety compatibility group only after event terms, denominators, zero semantics, relatedness, and seriousness are harmonized."},{"gap_id":"senolytics-registry-surveillance-breadth","gap_type":"coverage_gap","category":"active_trials_registries","description":"Only two active no-results registry records are present. trial.","intervention":"Intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin.","comparator":"Untreated control.","endpoint_family":"Overall adverse events, publication-table preferred-term adverse events, serious term-specific result now has structured adverse_event.preferred_term and arm-level count-status fields. Pooling remains blocked because the control headache cell is blank/ambiguous rather than an explicit event count, and no comparative effect or uncertainty is available."},{"result_id":"dq-bone-diarrhea-20wk-descriptive","missing_fields":["effect.value","effect.uncertainty"],"impact":"blocks_pooling","note":"The D+Q diarrhea count is explicit, but the control cell is blank/ambiguous and cannot support a comparative effect without unsupported zero handling."},{"result_id":"dq-bone-nausea-20wk-descriptive","missing_fields":["effect.value","effect.uncertainty"],"impact":"blocks_pooling","note":"The D+Q nausea count is explicit, but the control cell is blank/ambiguous and cannot support a comparative effect without unsupported zero handling."},{"result_id":"dq-bone-constipation-20wk-descriptive","missing_fields":["effect.value","effect.uncertainty"],"impact":"blocks_pooling","note":"The D+Q constipation count is explicit, but the control cell is blank/ambiguous and cannot support a comparative effect without unsupported zero handling."},{"result_id":"dq-bone-gastrointestinal-reflux-20wk-descriptive","missing_fields":["effect.value","effect.uncertainty"],"impact":"blocks_pooling","note":"The D+Q gastrointestinal reflux count is explicit, but the control cell is blank/ambiguous and cannot support a comparative effect without unsupported zero handling."},{"result_id":"dq-bone-vertigo-20wk-descriptive","missing_fields":["effect.value","effect.uncertainty"],"impact":"blocks_pooling","note":"The D+Q vertigo count is explicit, but the control cell is blank/ambiguous and cannot support a comparative effect without unsupported zero handling."},{"result_id":"dq-bone-fatigue-20wk-descriptive","missing_fields":["effect.value","effect.uncertainty"],"impact":"blocks_pooling","note":"The D+Q fatigue count is explicit, but the control cell is blank/ambiguous and cannot support a comparative effect without unsupported zero handling; the separate fatigue-related withdrawal narrative should not be double-counted."},{"result_id":"dq-bone-adverse-event-discontinuations-20wk-descriptive","missing_fields":["effect.value","effect.uncertainty"],"impact":"blocks_pooling","note":"The registry provides explicit adverse-event discontinuation counts, but the result is kept descriptive because control count is zero and discontinuation reasons are heterogeneous."}]},"tags":["senolytics","dasatinib-quercetin","bone","safety","adverse-events","pooling-blocked"]}
